categories.label: Delivery / Shipping
categories.policy: Check tracking status first. If the delivery is delayed beyond the promised window, create a logistics investigation ticket and offer status follow-up.
next_actions: Confirm order number and tracking status.
Send customer a delivery status response.

categories.label: Refund / Return
categories.policy: Check order eligibility and payment status. If eligible, route to billing support for refund processing.
next_actions: Route to billing support if refund criteria are met.

categories.label: Account / Login
categories.policy: Verify customer identity before changing account information or unlocking access.
next_actions: Provide password reset or unlock instructions.

categories.label: Technical Issue
categories.policy: Collect reproduction steps and device information, then route to technical support for diagnosis.
next_actions: Ask for device, browser or app version.
Route to technical support with logs if available.
